final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing movie poster inspired by the aesthetic of 大话西游, reimagined in 90s Hong Kong cinema style.

Style/medium: needs a 90s 港片 film aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a romantic embrace as the foreground focal point, distant figures in the background
Subject: must include:
  - 至尊宝 and 紫霞 sharing a kiss / embrace against a city wall (foreground, primary)
  - 牛魔王 standing in the distance (background)
  - 唐僧 standing in the distance (background)
Scene/backdrop: must include a 城墙 (ancient city wall) setting
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic, romantically charged 90s Hong Kong cinema atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm, faded, filmic direction — exact tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: must include film grain (胶片颗粒) texture throughout
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
